BASIC
TERMINOLOGY
• Landing Pages:
1. Opt-in Page
2. Lead Generation Page
3. Sales Letter
4. Content/Article/Pre-sell Page
5. VSL
6. Webinar Sign-up Page
• Affiliate Marketing
• Affiliate and CPA Networks
• Leads
• Email Lists
• Conversions
• Upsell/Downsell
• Impressions
• Above/Below the Fold
• Traffic Sources

somebody has to be motivated to taking action.

-- 21 of 52 --

“WHOEVER IS ABLE AND WILLING TO
SPEND THE MOST AMOUNT OF
MONEY TO ACQUIRE A CUSTOMER
WINS.”
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 52 --

INCREASE CUSTOMER VALUE THROUGH SLM
SALES FUNNELS
Note: Since we now know that company able and willing to spend the most
amount of money to acquire a customer will always win
And
Sales Funnels are the only practical way to increase the value of each customer
and hence allow companies to spend more to acquire new customers
It Can Therefore Be Said:
THE COMPANY WITH THE BEST SALES FUNNEL ALWAYS WINS!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
